## Strategy

Project is at T-zero on the C side: no `src/`, no `c` subsegments, no `include/structs.h`. Tooling (splat, seed_c, decomp_loop, asm-differ, m2c, permuter, /decomp, /decomp-lead) is now in place — next phase is **pipeline validation**: cash in five trivially small leaves (one per build-system aspect) before tackling any cohesive subsystem. Each pick below is a one-function subsegment, so flipping it gives an immediate file-level md5 win and proves the corresponding part of the pipeline (raw return, extern global, hardware reg, overlay flip, libultra-vs-link policy). Once the wave validates, expand into `0x800AB000–0x800B3E40` (libultra leaves) and `0x80099XXX` (libnusys leaves) breadth-first while the call-graph for game-side code in `0x80025C50–0x800993XX` is still warming up in Ghidra. Ghidra has 367/512 tracked functions with curated names — those names flow into `symbol_addrs.txt` only after the function matches, so early picks should favor what Ghidra has already labeled (e.g. `osAfterPreNMI`, `nuGfxSwapCfb`, `osGetThreadPri`, `__osSiDeviceBusy`).

## In flight

_None — no `src/` files yet. No nonmatchings scratch dirs in flight._

## Next 5 targets

1. `func_800B3E40` (2 instrs, ROM 0x8F240, parent subseg 0x8F240). Rationale: Ghidra-named `returns_0`; smallest possible match — validates seed → KMC → objdump → asm-differ → flip → spot-check end-to-end.
2. `func_800B1A80` (3 instrs, ROM 0x8CE80, parent subseg 0x8CE80). Rationale: global getter `return D_800C9560;` — validates HI16/LO16 extern handling via `reloc_addrs.txt` and undefined-syms paths.
3. `func_800B09F0` (5 instrs, ROM 0x8BDF0, parent subseg 0x8BDF0). Rationale: reads `AI_STATUS_REG` — validates `hardware_regs.txt` symbol path and N64 PR header includes for hardware MMIO.
4. `func_ovl0_801F4A30` (1-instr nop stub, ROM 0xADD30, parent subseg 0xADD30 in overlay_0). Rationale: validates the **overlay** subseg flip (different ld-script glue than main seg); same shape exists per overlay (`ovl3/7/8/9/10/15/16`), so one win unlocks 8 sibling stubs.
5. `__osSiDeviceBusy` / `func_800B2B30` (5 instrs, ROM 0x8DF30, parent subseg 0x8DF30). Rationale: forces the **libultra-decomp-vs-link** strategy decision — Ghidra already names it `__osSiDeviceBusy`, and the `0x800AB000–0x800B3E40` band has dozens of similar libultra leaves (`__osSpSetStatus`, `__osDpDeviceBusy`, `osAfterPreNMI`, `osGetThreadPri`, …). Pick first one, set the precedent.

All five subsegments contain exactly one function — every match produces a one-file md5-checkable win.

## Subsegments to flip (`asm` → `c`)

Cohesive one-function leaf subsegments ready to open as soon as the matching seed is in hand. User-action (not agent-action): flip each `[<offset>, asm]` → `[<offset>, c]` in `mariogolf64.yaml`, then `make extract` to scaffold `src/<offset>.c`.

- `0x8F240` — `func_800B3E40` / `returns_0`. Trivial; first pipeline-validation target.
- `0x8CE80` — `func_800B1A80`. Global-getter; second pipeline target.
- `0x8BDF0` — `func_800B09F0`. Hardware-reg poll; third pipeline target.
- `0xADD30` — `func_ovl0_801F4A30`. Per-overlay nop stub; validates overlay glue.
- `0x8DF30` — `__osSiDeviceBusy`. libultra precedent.
- `0x8DF10` — `func_800B2B10` (DPC status busy). Sibling of `__osSiDeviceBusy`; flip together once libultra policy is set.
- `0x8BE10` — `func_800B0A10`. `return sqrtf(x);` — exercises FPU sqrt.s emission.
- `0x869E0` — `func_800AB5E0` / `__osSpSetStatus(0x400)`. Tiny wrapper, libultra.
- `0x8AC80` — `osAfterPreNMI`. Trivial libultra wrapper; Ghidra-named.
- `0x877B0` — `osGetThreadPri`. Single-branch libultra; Ghidra-named.
